Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants a process tree model based on the provided event log The event log has the following activities RA VF AE RMI AD SC AC

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Lets trace the cases Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Observations 1 RA is always the first activity 2 VF is always the second activity 3 AE is always the third activity

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: After AE there is a loop or optional block Case 2 goes straight to AD Case 1 RMI VF then AD Case 3 RMI RMI VF then AD

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets re examine Case 1 AE RMI VF AD Case 3 AE RMI RMI VF AD Is it a loop of RMI followed by VF Or a loop of RMI

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If it was a loop of RMI VF then in Case 3 it would be RMI VF RMI VF But it is RMI RMI VF So VF is executed once after the loop

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Wait in Case 1 and 3 after AE we have RMI one or more times then VF This looks like a loop where the body is RMI and the exit goes to VF

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After AE we have zero or more RMI followed by VF Since Case 2 has zero RMI we need an XOR between tau skip and the loop RMI tau

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: So in process tree terms AE then X tau loop RMI tau then VF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: After VF we have AD SC AC Case 1 AD SC AC Case 2 AD SC AC Case 3 AD SC AC Yes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus the whole sequence is RA VF AE zero or more RMI VF AD SC AC

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Lets construct the tree Root sequence children RA VF AE XOR tau LOOP RMI tau VF AD SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Lets do a quick sanity check of the traces generated by this tree RA VF AE tau VF AD SC AC matches Case 2 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC matches Case 1 RA VF AE RMI tau RMI VF AD SC AC matches Case 3 Everything matches perfectly

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The final process tree is sequence RA VF AE X tau loop RMI tau VF AD SC AC
